name: 2pk 3" x 6" LED Candles Cream - Threshold™: Paraffin Wax, Traditional Decor, Pillar Style
description: Give your home a warm and subtle glow with these beautiful 2pk 6" x 3" LED Candles in Cream from Threshold. These candles illuminate and create just the right mood from table top to every nook and cranny of the home. It also makes for a great choice of gift for a loved one.
